creator: destination_wellknown
caption:
Things NOT to do in Copenhagen as a tourist 🇩🇰

Copenhagen is probably one of my favourite cities in the world… in the summertime 😀  So if you haven’t booked a summer getaway in Europe yet, consider travelling to Copenhagen in the next coming months 🇩🇰
 And in case you’re wondering, you CAN use cash in Copenhagen (there’s actually a law that states that any shop/restaurant etc has to take cash), but there’s just no need to take out cash if you don’t specifically want to pay by cash 💸  The only place you’d need to use cash in Copenhagen would be if you haven’t got a ticket/card for the buses, but if you download the “DOT Tickets app” you won’t have that problem ✌️  I don’t even bother bringing my wallet anymore - I just pay with my phone anywhere and have done so for a good few years 😅  Have you been to Copenhagen? What did you think about the Danish capital? 🇩🇰

transcription.text: Here are 5 of the most common mistakes tourists make when they are coming to Copenhagen. If you've never ridden a bike before in your life, Copenhagen is not the place to learn it. It's dangerous and the locals will hate you. Don't visit the Little Mermaid, it's literally just a little tiny statue and there's nothing going on out there. Don't take out cash. Nobody uses cash here and you can use your card or Apple Pay anywhere. Don't eat at the overpriced restaurants in Stroll or Nyhavn. These places are basically tourist traps. This is the best city in the world during summer time but winters here are tragic so just come during summer.
